description: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take 60~80% less damage from explosive attacks, and are immune to Stun. (Does not stack)
While at a base, increases the Watering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)
When activated, Anubis changes the player's attack type toGround and increases Attack by 30~50%. Occasionally evades attacks with a flash sidestep during battle.
Can be ridden. While in party, the player gains Cold Resistance +2. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases the damage dealt to ores by 1100~3300%, and you can obtain 150~300% more Ore while mounted.
This Pal's abilities are still being investigated.
Can be ridden. Grants Air Dash, to move at even higher speeds.
Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type toWater and increases Attack by 5~20%.
Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the playerâs attack type toIce and increases Attack by 5~20%.
While in party, attacking enemies afflicted with Poison reduces their Attack by 40~80%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While mounted, delivers crushing blows with a hammer forged fromIce.

Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type toElectric and increases Attack by 5~20%. This Palâs Movement Speed increases by 5~25% for each otherElectric Pal in your party. (Excluding Beakon)

Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type toIce and increases Attack by 5~20%. This Palâs Movement Speed increases by 5~25% for each otherIce Pal in your party. (Excluding Beakon Cryst)
While in party, increases Elizabee's Attack. Sometimes drops Honey when assigned to Ranch.
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Ray. When this Pal uses Nightmare Ray, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier.
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Bloom. When this Pal uses Nightmare Bloom, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier.
Can be ridden. While in party, increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by 5~10% whenever you defeat an enemy. This effect lasts 20 seconds and stacks up to five times.

Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

While in party, increases Attack ofGrass Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, Pal Eggs you pick up have a 35~45% chance of becoming an Alpha Pal Egg. (Does not stack)

Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take 15~30% lessElectric damage and are immune to Electrify. (Does not stack)
When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier.

When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by 30~65% but only when not in combat. (Does not stack)
Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores 100~200 Palâs Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)
Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores 100~200 Palâs Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)
While in party, when the player performs a dodge roll or dodge step, Carnibora creates a whirlwind that deals damage to enemies it touches (Grass / Power: 40~80). (Does not stack)
While in party, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by 100~200. (Does not stack)
While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.
When activated, grants Night Vision to see in dark places. Activate again to turn off. Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.
While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.
While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

Can be ridden. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increases by 2~6% for each otherNeutral Pal in your party. When in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by 0.15~0.75% per second. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. While in party, the Pal fighting alongside you gradually loses Health in exchange for 40~80% Attack increase. (Does not stack)

While in party, increases Attack ofNeutral Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While airborne before landing, the player's Attack is increased by 50~86%.

When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in party, improves player's and Pals'Dark damage to enemy weak points by 25~40%. (Does not stack)

While in party, when attacking enemy weak point, increases the power of the next weak point attack by 30~60%. (Does not stack)
While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies withDark magic bullets. These bullets will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

When activated, the player's attacks inflict Poison 2~6. While in party, grants the player and party Pals immunity to Poison, and nullifies the effects of toxic gas in the World Tree area. (Does not stack)
Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by 50~100% while mounted on sand.

While in party, when the player's Health falls below 50%, Dupin generates an explosion around the player (Fire / Power: 100~200 / Burn buildup: 777). Additionally, while the player's Health is below 50%, the player's Attack is increased by 30~50%. (Does not stack)
